mapper.select: select achievement_id, user_id, achievement_code, achievement_title, achievement_desc, status, progress_value, earned_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_user_achievement where user_id = #{param1} and achievement_code = #{param2} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sc_user_achievement(user_id, achievement_code, achievement_title, achievement_desc, status, progress_value, earned_time, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{userId}, #{achievementCode}, #{achievementTitle}, #{achievementDesc}, #{status}, #{progressValue}, #{earnedTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
